name: default — md size (asserts EVERY slot: subset-match won't catch a missing key)

expected.toolbox: inline-flex items-center gap-0.5 p-0.5 rounded-[calc(var(--radius-box)*0.6)] bg-base-200/60
expected.iconBtn: h-7 w-7 inline-grid place-content-center shrink-0 rounded-[calc(var(--radius-box)*0.45)] text-base-content/70 hover:text-base-content hover:bg-base-content/[0.08] transition-colors duration-100 cursor-pointer select-none [&_svg]:w-[1.05rem] [&_svg]:h-[1.05rem] [&_svg]:stroke-[1.75] disabled:opacity-40 disabled:cursor-not-allowed
expected.toolbarBtn: h-8 px-3 text-[length:var(--text-field-sm)] inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-1 shrink-0 rounded-[calc(var(--radius-box)*0.6)] bg-base-200 text-base-content/80 hover:text-base-content hover:bg-base-content/[0.1] transition-colors duration-100 cursor-pointer select-none disabled:opacity-40 disabled:cursor-not-allowed
expected.grid: pn-sheet w-full overflow-auto rounded-[var(--radius-box)] tune-border border-base-300 text-[length:var(--text-field-md)] text-base-content
expected.headerCell: px-[var(--px-input-md)] py-[var(--py-input-md)] text-left font-medium text-base-content bg-base-100 select-none align-middle
expected.headerCellSortable: px-[var(--px-input-md)] py-[var(--py-input-md)] text-left font-medium text-base-content bg-base-100 select-none align-middle cursor-pointer hover:bg-base-200/60 transition-colors duration-100
expected.cell: relative px-[var(--px-input-md)] py-[var(--py-input-md)] text-base-content align-middle select-none cursor-default
expected.rowNumGutter: pn-sheet-gutter px-2 py-[var(--py-input-md)] text-center text-base-content/45 bg-base-100 tabular-nums select-none cursor-default align-middle
expected.resizeHandle: absolute top-0 right-0 h-full w-1 cursor-col-resize select-none hover:bg-primary/40
expected.fillHandle: absolute -bottom-1 -right-1 w-2 h-2 bg-primary rounded-[1px] cursor-crosshair
expected.sortCaret: shrink-0 inline-grid place-content-center w-4 h-4 rounded-[calc(var(--radius-box)*0.4)] cursor-pointer select-none hover:bg-base-content/[0.08] transition-colors duration-100 [&_svg]:w-3 [&_svg]:h-3
expected.numStepper: inline-grid place-content-center w-6 h-6 shrink-0 text-[length:var(--text-field-md)] leading-none text-base-content/55 hover:text-primary hover:bg-base-content/[0.08] rounded-[calc(var(--radius-box)*0.4)] cursor-pointer select-none transition-colors duration-100
expected.checkCell: pn-sheet-check inline-grid place-content-center align-middle w-[1.15em] h-[1.15em] box-border cursor-pointer tune-border border-base-content/35 rounded-[calc(var(--radius-box)*0.4)] hover:border-primary transition-colors duration-100
